content.json:
## Feature Adoption Dashboard
Understand which features users love and user journeys.

content.query:
customEvents
| where name endswith ".opened"
| summarize Count = count() by Feature = name
| top 10 by Count desc
| render barchart
content.title: Feature Popularity (Top 10)

content.query:
let steps = dynamic(["connection.connectCompleted","dataExplorer.opened","queryEditor.opened","queryEditor.queryCompleted","ragChat.opened","ragChat.requestCompleted"]);
customEvents
| where name in (steps)
| where tostring(customDimensions.result) == "success" or tostring(customDimensions.result) == ""
| summarize Users = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.sessionId)) by Step = name
| extend Order = array_index_of(steps, Step)
| order by Order asc
| project Step, Users
| render columnchart
content.title: User Journey Funnel

content.query:
let usersWhoOpened = customEvents
    | where name endswith ".opened"
    | summarize firstSeen = min(timestamp) by sessionId = tostring(customDimensions.sessionId), feature = name;
let usersWhoReturned = customEvents
    | where name endswith ".opened"
    | extend sessionId = tostring(customDimensions.sessionId)
    | join kind=inner usersWhoOpened on sessionId, $left.name == $right.feature
    | where timestamp > firstSeen + 7d
    | summarize returnedUsers = dcount(tostring(sessionId)) by feature;
usersWhoOpened
| summarize totalUsers = dcount(tostring(sessionId)) by feature
| join kind=leftouter usersWhoReturned on feature
| extend retentionRate = round(100.0 * todouble(returnedUsers) / totalUsers, 2)
| project feature, totalUsers, returnedUsers, retentionRate
| order by retentionRate desc
content.title: Feature Retention (7-day)
